title: South Hays Fire Department ransomware incident

extortion.description: Hays County Emergency Services District 3 provides essential fire prevention and emergency services to the South Hays County area. The district focuses on recruiting full-time firefighters and is dedicated to community safety and preparedness. In addition to emergency response, the district promotes public knowledge on fire safety and outdoor burning regulations. Their commitment to accessibility ensures that all community members can engage with their services effectively. The company headquarters is located in 3528 Hunter Road, San Marcos, Texas 78666.11-50 Employees
